name: The Haunting Of Stabbey Road
short_description: Discover the dark secrets of a once renowned recording studio.
detailed_description:
You are a paranormal investigator, called to investigate anomalies at Stabbey Road Studios, once the leading name in the world of music production. Your task is to follow instructions to master five tracks to discover the anomalies plaguing the studio and reveal its dark secrets.

The studio's computer has a channel strip plugin ready for you to use in your task. Turn the knobs of the equalizer and compressor to change how the song sounds and click the render button when you're ready with a song. If you get the masters correct and discover the anomalies, maybe you won't be the next victim...
